questions.question: What is the command to initiate R from the command prompt?
What is the purpose of the setwd() function in R?
questions.hint: To set the working directory in R

questions.question: What is the difference between the assignment operator (=) and the equality operator (==) in R?
questions.hint: The assignment operator (=) assigns a value to a variable, while the equality operator (==) checks if two values are equal
